message:
test(proptest): add property tests for event_stream and session_workflow_explorer

proptest_event_stream: 35 tests covering StreamCursor monotonicity,
SeverityLevel ordering/parsing, EventStreamFilter builder/emptiness,
WaitCondition serde roundtrips.

proptest_session_workflow_explorer: 45 tests covering enum serde
roundtrips, EventSeverity ordering, TimelineQuery matching logic,
SessionWorkflowExplorer ingest/query/diff/extract, WorkflowTrace
registration, ExtractedEvent conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
